Asked for clarification on what the user wants to do with process 14013.
why is it using so much memory?
Explained that process 14013 is a `pc capture` command using 1.66 GB RSS with high VSZ from memory-mapping, and offered options to investigate further.

Identified the root cause as `build_embedder()` being called twice, loading the ONNX model twice and doubling peak RSS; fixed by creating a shared embedder built once, cutting peak RSS roughly in half.
